summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AI Shopping Assistant feature. All 8 features tested and working correctly. Backend API tests (20/20 passed) and frontend UI tests all successful.
passed_tests: AI Shopping Assistant opens with Atlas logo branding - SUCCESS
Chat header shows 'Hispalo AI - Shopping Assistant' - SUCCESS
Sending product query (gluten-free snacks) returns recommended products - SUCCESS
Products appear in grid panel next to chat (split layout) - SUCCESS
Product cards have image, name, price, certifications, Add to Cart button - SUCCESS
Clicking Add to Cart from chat adds item and shows success toast - SUCCESS
Cart count in header updates after adding from chat - SUCCESS (updates quantity if item exists)
Pure conversational messages (Hello) don't force products - SUCCESS
Backend: 20/20 API tests passed including 5 new AI chat tests
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user and products
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Shopping Assistant feature is fully functional. The chat endpoint at /api/chat/message returns structured data with recommended_products array. Products are only shown when there's shopping intent. Atlas logo is properly displayed. All e-commerce flows (login, add to cart, view cart) continue to work correctly.

feature_verification.split_layout: Chat panel (380px) + Products grid panel (340px) when products are recommended
feature_verification.product_cards: Display image, name, price, certifications badges, Add to Cart button
feature_verification.add_to_cart: Works from chat, shows success toast, updates cart quantity
feature_verification.conversational_mode: AI responds naturally without forcing products for greetings
